Join a meeting now using the unique code at the end of your meeting link. It'll look something like this: abc-defg-hjk
Explore features
Video calls, enhanced with AI
Make connecting easy with AI-powered video calls that enable collaboration and expression.
Sign in
Go to app
Try Meet for work
Join a meeting now
Join
Join a meeting now using the unique code at the end of your meeting link. It'll look something like this: abc-defg-hjk
Explore features
Gemini in Meet
Flexible
Enhance
Collaborate
Secure
Premium
Customers
FAQs
Drive decisions and action with AI-enhanced meetings
Turn discussions into next steps instantly. With Gemini in Google Meet automating your notes, translating conversations, and surfacing key insights, your team can focus entirely on making choices and moving work forward. Unlock
Gemini in Google Meet
.
Meet on any device
Join on your mobile phone or tablet via the Google Meet app, available on the
App Store
and
Play Store
. Or connect from your computer browser – no software install needed.
Built for better conversations
Meet handles the details so you can focus on the conversation.
Look your best, no matter where you are
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
Enjoy up to 1080p video quality
1
and studio look or studio lighting (premium features), and personalize your background.
Ensure you're always heard clearly
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
AI reduces background noise so you can stay professional in loud environments, while audio syncing lets you sit right next to your teammates on the same call without echoes or feedback.
Stay informed with live captions
View subtitles as participants speak, in real time.
Do more, together
Seamlessly collaborate with integrations across Google Workspace.
Connect as work is happening
Make meetings an easy extension of your daily workflows by joining directly  from
Google Docs
,
Sheets
, and
Slides
.
Help everyone arrive prepared
Easily set up meetings with the agenda, attachments, and participant RSVPs all in one place.
Keep presentations engaging
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
Interactive tools like polls, breakout rooms, moderation controls, and Q&A enable everyone  to participate.
Enjoy every moment
Make your time together fun. Watch YouTube videos, listen to music, and play games with Meet live sharing
2
. Enjoy interactive features like effects and emoji reactions.
Stay safe
Your data is
encrypted
by default, and an array of
safety measures
– like advanced encryption, anti-abuse measures, and privacy
controls
– keep your data private.
Conference room devices from trusted partners
Google Meet hardware
provides secure, scalable meeting solutions for any room. Cross-platform interoperability enables internal and external teams to easily join the discussion, while built-in AI ensures everyone feels included and stays engaged.
Do more with premium features
Sign up for a
Google Workspace
or
Google One Premium
plan to access premium features.
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.

Hold group calls for up to 24 hours.

All plans billed monthly
All prices $USD
Starter, Standard, and Plus plans can be purchased for a maximum of 300 users. There is no minimum or maximum user limit for Enterprise plans. Google Workspace customers may have access to additional features for a limited promotional period.
*Google Workspace provides flexible pooled storage per user that is shared across the organization. Business Starter includes 30 GB pooled storage per user, Business Standard includes 2 TB, Business Plus and Enterprise Plus include 5 TB. Visit our Help Center to learn more about getting additional storage for your organization.
**Offer available to new Google Workspace customers only. This introductory price is only available for the first 20 users added, for 12 months. Standard pricing will apply to all users after 12 months. Actual price per user may vary by up to ~0.01% due to rounding. Final price will be shown before completing sign-up.

Join a meeting now using the unique code at the end of your meeting link. It'll look something like this: abc-defg-hjk
Explore features
Video calls, enhanced with AI
Make connecting easy with AI-powered video calls that enable collaboration and expression.
Sign in
Go to app
Try Meet for work
Join a meeting now
Join
Join a meeting now using the unique code at the end of your meeting link. It'll look something like this: abc-defg-hjk
Explore features
Gemini in Meet
Flexible
Enhance
Collaborate
Secure
Premium
Customers
FAQs
Drive decisions and action with AI-enhanced meetings
Turn discussions into next steps instantly. With Gemini in Google Meet automating your notes, translating conversations, and surfacing key insights, your team can focus entirely on making choices and moving work forward. Unlock
Gemini in Google Meet
.
Meet on any device
Join on your mobile phone or tablet via the Google Meet app, available on the
App Store
and
Play Store
. Or connect from your computer browser – no software install needed.
Built for better conversations
Meet handles the details so you can focus on the conversation.
Look your best, no matter where you are
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
Enjoy up to 1080p video quality
1
and studio look or studio lighting (premium features), and personalize your background.
Ensure you're always heard clearly
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
AI reduces background noise so you can stay professional in loud environments, while audio syncing lets you sit right next to your teammates on the same call without echoes or feedback.
Stay informed with live captions
View subtitles as participants speak, in real time.
Do more, together
Seamlessly collaborate with integrations across Google Workspace.
Connect as work is happening
Make meetings an easy extension of your daily workflows by joining directly  from
Google Docs
,
Sheets
, and
Slides
.
Help everyone arrive prepared
Easily set up meetings with the agenda, attachments, and participant RSVPs all in one place.
Keep presentations engaging
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
Interactive tools like polls, breakout rooms, moderation controls, and Q&A enable everyone  to participate.
Enjoy every moment
Make your time together fun. Watch YouTube videos, listen to music, and play games with Meet live sharing
2
. Enjoy interactive features like effects and emoji reactions.
Stay safe
Your data is
encrypted
by default, and an array of
safety measures
– like advanced encryption, anti-abuse measures, and privacy
controls
– keep your data private.
Conference room devices from trusted partners
Google Meet hardware
provides secure, scalable meeting solutions for any room. Cross-platform interoperability enables internal and external teams to easily join the discussion, while built-in AI ensures everyone feels included and stays engaged.
Do more with premium features
Sign up for a
Google Workspace
or
Google One Premium
plan to access premium features.
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
Meet longer
Hold group calls for up to 24 hours.
Premium feature
This feature is available on certain
Google One
, Google Workspace
Business
, and Google Workspace
Enterprise
plans.
Keep a record
Use recordings and transcripts to capture what was discussed.

analysis.name: Google Meet
analysis.tagline: Online Web and Video Conferencing Calls
analysis.value_proposition: Google Meet is a video conferencing platform deeply integrated into Google Workspace, offering AI-powered meeting features, enterprise-grade security, and seamless connectivity across Google's productivity suite.
analysis.ideal_customer: Organizations already using Google Workspace who want unified video conferencing, chat, and productivity tools with AI features built in

features.name: video meetings
features.description: Browser and app-based video conferencing with HD video

features.name: meeting participant capacity (100)
features.description: Up to 100 participants per video meeting on Starter tier

features.name: meeting participant capacity (150)
features.description: Up to 150 participants per video meeting on Standard tier
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with recording, noise cancellation, 150 participants

features.name: meeting participant capacity (500)
features.description: Up to 500 participants per video meeting on Plus tier
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with attendance tracking, 500 participants

features.name: meeting participant capacity (1000)
features.description: Up to 1000 participants per video meeting on Enterprise tier
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with in-domain live streaming, 1000 participants

features.name: meeting recording
features.description: Record meetings for later playback and sharing
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with recording, noise cancellation, 150 participants

features.name: noise cancellation
features.description: AI-powered background noise suppression during meetings
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with recording, noise cancellation, 150 participants

features.name: attendance tracking
features.description: Track and report on meeting attendance
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with attendance tracking, 500 participants

features.name: in-domain live streaming
features.description: Livestream meetings to viewers within the organization's domain
features.evidence_quote: Video meetings with in-domain live streaming, 1000 participants

features.name: live streaming
features.description: Broadcast meetings to a broader audience beyond direct participants

features.name: screen sharing / presentation
features.description: Share your screen or specific content during a meeting

features.name: camera content presentation
features.description: Present physical content by pointing a secondary camera at it during a meeting
features.evidence_quote: Present content from a camera in Google Meet

features.name: in-meeting chat
features.description: Send text messages to participants during a video meeting

features.name: host controls
features.description: Controls for meeting hosts to manage participants, muting, and access

features.name: background effects
features.description: Virtual backgrounds and blur effects for video meetings

features.name: ai background image generation
features.description: Generate custom background images using Gemini AI in Meet
features.evidence_quote: Create background images with Gemini in Google Meet

features.name: ai meeting notes
features.description: Gemini AI automatically takes notes during meetings
features.evidence_quote: Take notes for me in Google Meet

features.name: ai notes for in-person meetings
features.description: Use 'take notes for me' feature even for in-person meetings captured via device
features.evidence_quote: Use 'take notes for me' for in person meetings

features.name: ask gemini in meet
features.description: Query Gemini AI assistant during an active meeting

features.name: ai video and audio enhancement
features.description: Gemini-powered enhancement of video quality and audio clarity
features.evidence_quote: Enhance your video & audio with Gemini in Google Meet

features.name: speech translation
features.description: Live translated captions or audio during meetings across supported languages

features.name: adaptive audio
features.description: Multi-device adaptive audio merging so multiple devices in same room don't create echo

features.name: reactions
features.description: Emoji reactions during video meetings

features.name: activities in meet
features.description: Collaborative in-meeting activities (polls, Q&A, whiteboards, etc.)

features.name: transfer meeting between devices
features.description: Move an active meeting from one device to another without interruption

features.name: google calendar integration
features.description: Schedule and join meetings directly from Google Calendar

features.name: google gmail integration
features.description: Start or join meetings from Gmail

features.name: google chat integration
features.description: Launch or join meetings from Google Chat threads

features.name: google drive integration
features.description: Access and share Drive files within meeting context

features.name: google docs/sheets/slides integration
features.description: Collaborate on Docs, Sheets, and Slides alongside meetings
features.evidence_quote: Docs — Word processing... Sheets — Spreadsheets... Slides — Presentation builder

features.name: google gemini app integration
features.description: AI assistant powered by Gemini embedded across Meet and Workspace

features.name: notebooklm integration
features.description: AI research assistant integration with expanded access on Standard+
features.evidence_quote: NotebookLM with expanded access to features

features.name: google vids integration
features.description: AI-powered video creator/editor integration with Workspace
features.evidence_quote: Google Vids AI-powered video creator and editor

features.name: appsheet integration
features.description: No-code app and automation builder connected to Workspace

features.name: calling
features.description: Make and receive phone-style calls within Google Meet
features.evidence_quote: Get Started with calling in Google Meet

features.name: video messages
features.description: Record and send asynchronous video messages to contacts
features.evidence_quote: Your audio & video data stays private with video messages sent in Google Meet

features.name: meet hardware support
features.description: Dedicated hardware devices with touch controller UI for conference rooms
features.evidence_quote: Try the new Google Meet Hardware touch controller UI

features.name: dual screen support
features.description: Use two screens in a Google Meet session for expanded layout
features.evidence_quote: Learn how Dual Screen on Google Meet works

features.name: android auto support

differentiators: Deep native integration across entire Google Workspace suite (Gmail, Drive, Calendar, Chat)
Gemini AI embedded directly in meetings for notes, translation, and Q&A
Multi-device adaptive audio merging eliminates echo when multiple devices share a room
On-device Web ML for background effects without cloud processing
Client-side encryption (CSE) for maximum data privacy on Enterprise
Works on Android Auto and Apple CarPlay for mobile contexts
Free for personal use with no time limit on 1:1 calls

recent_ships.what: Multi-device adaptive audio merging — merges audio from multiple devices in same room
recent_ships.source: Google Meet rolls out multi-device adaptive audio merging (HN 627↑)

recent_ships.what: AI-powered background features using on-device Web ML
recent_ships.source: Background Features in Google Meet, Powered by Web ML (HN 427↑)

recent_ships.what: Noise cancellation feature publicly shipped and documented
recent_ships.source: How Google Meet's noise cancellation works (HN 390↑)

recent_ships.what: Premium video meeting features made free for all users
recent_ships.source: Google Meet premium video meetings–free for everyone (HN 224↑/182↑)

recent_ships.what: Gemini AI features: take notes for me, ask Gemini, speech translation, AI background generation
Adaptive Audio feature for personal device echo cancellation across multiple devices
recent_ships.source: docs — Use Adaptive Audio in Meet

praised: Noise cancellation quality — high HN engagement on how it works (390↑)
Multi-device adaptive audio merging praised as technically impressive (627↑)
Making premium features free appreciated by users (224↑, 182↑)
Background features running on-device via Web ML seen as technically notable (427↑)
complaints: Sovereignty/vendor lock-in concerns — France actively seeking to replace Google Meet, Zoom, and Teams (900↑ HN discussion)
Privacy concerns — GoogleMeetRoulette demonstrated random public meetings could be joined (371↑)
App merger confusion — 'Google's video chat merger begins: Now there are two Google Meet apps' caused user frustration (295↑)

free_tier.limits: 100 participants, 60-min group meetings; unlimited 1:1 calls for personal Google accounts

tiers.name: Starter
tiers.headline_inclusions: 30 GB pooled storage, 100-participant meetings, custom business email, Gemini in Gmail

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2 TB storage, 150-participant meetings w/ recording + noise cancellation, Gemini in Meet, NotebookLM

tiers.name: Plus
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 TB storage, 500-participant meetings w/ attendance tracking, Vault, Secure LDAP, eDiscovery

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5 TB+ storage, 1000-participant meetings w/ live streaming, DLP, CSE, data regions, Cloud Identity Premium

pricing.notes: Starter/Standard/Plus capped at 300 users max; Enterprise has no user limit. 14-day free trial available. Promotional 50% off first 3 months for new customers (limited time). Annual commitment saves ~16% vs monthly billing. Assured Controls and AI Classification available as add-ons on Enterprise. Pooled storage is org-wide, not per-seat.
